title: Pinterest Q2 2021 Earnings Preview: What You Should Know Beyond the Headline Estimates
text: Ahead of Pinterest's Q2 2021 earnings report, analysts focused on several key metrics beyond headline estimates. The consensus EPS estimate was $0.13 (compared to -$0.07 in the prior year quarter) and the consensus revenue estimate was $562.12M (+106.3% Y/Y). Monthly active users were estimated at 484.4M with U.S. monthly active users estimated at 96.1M and international monthly active users at 388.3M. Average revenue per user was forecasted at $1.16. Key catalysts included the launch of Idea Pins feature and Content Claiming Portal, which were expected to boost user engagement. Pinterest had also expanded its partnership with Shopify to 27 new countries in mid-April. Over the prior 2 years, PINS had beaten EPS estimates 88% of the time and revenue estimates 88% of the time.
